auth.label: Listbuilding API Key
auth.description: KlickTipp Listbuilding API key sent as the apikey JSON body field. Create it in KlickTipp under List Building > New List Building > Entry via API key: https://developers.klicktipp.com/guides/listbuilding-api.

actions.name: signin
actions.description: Create or update a subscriber and associate the tag linked to the KlickTipp Listbuilding API key.

email.description: The subscriber email address. KlickTipp requires either email or smsnumber for signin, and email for signout and signoff.

smsnumber.description: The subscriber phone number in international format, for example +4912345678 or 004912345678.

additionalProperties.description: A custom field value as a string. Use Unix timestamps in seconds for KlickTipp date, time, and date-time fields.

fields.description: Additional custom fields for the subscriber. Keys must match KlickTipp field names and values must match the configured field type formats.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating or updating a subscriber through the KlickTipp Listbuilding API signin endpoint.

items.description: A redirect URL returned by KlickTipp.

redirect_urls.description: Redirect URLs returned by KlickTipp for the configured opt-in flow.

actions.name: signoff
actions.description: Unsubscribe a contact by email address through the KlickTipp Listbuilding API key.

success.description: Whether every returned boolean result is true.

results.description: The raw boolean result array returned by KlickTipp.

actions.name: signout
actions.description: Remove the tag linked to the KlickTipp Listbuilding API key from a subscriber by email address.

inputSchema.description: Input for removing the Listbuilding API key tag.

success.description: Whether every returned boolean result is true.

results.description: The raw boolean result array returned by KlickTipp.
